rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into component implementations only when binding implementation-level details; use component types for abstract assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL scope boundaries: component type annexes must use only publicly visible features, not subcomponent paths.
Implementation annexes may bind to subcomponent ports only after those subcomponents and connections are declared.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes use syntax: annex agree {** ... **};
Boolean expressions in AGREE must match the data type of the referenced AADL port (bool, int, real).
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as variables in AGREE annexes.
Do not use subcomponent port names in component type annexes unless exposed via visible features.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
